basic.title: Zombie Attack Survival
basic.description: A 3D zombie survival game Using python and open gl. Players navigate procedurally generated environments, battle waves of zombies with dynamic weapon mechanics.
key_achievements: Developed a dynamic 3D environment with procedural terrain & Implemented multiple camera modes (third-person and Free-fly)
Cannon with limited ammo & Bullet physics with boundary checks

dl_ml_research.title: Multi-Omics Sarcoma Subtype Classification
dl_ml_research.description: Designed and implemented a deep learning architecture for sarcoma subtype classification using multi-omics data.
key_achievements: Resolved critical issues in TCGA sarcoma datasets regarding severe class imbalance.
Optimized model for low sample sizes to achieve high f1-macro scores.

dl_ml_research.title: Music Data Clustering and Feature Extraction
dl_ml_research.description: Extracted audio features and applied unsupervised learning techniques to cluster music data.
key_achievements: Developed multiple VAE variants (Simple, Conv & Conditional) to learn latent representations for cross-language music clustering and Evaluated clusters using Silhouette, DBI, ARI, and visualized cluster with t-SNE.
Builtamulti-modal pipeline combining audio features Mel spectrograms with lyrics embeddings (Sentence-Transformers).

web_applications.title: SurveyHub
web_applications.description: Developed a responsive survey platform with a security-first network layer and real-time voting.
key_achievements: Used Axios interceptors to automate JWT injection and to centralize 401/403 error handling.
Implemented TanStack Query and custom hooks to synchronize RBAC state, improve caching, and reduce redundant API calls.
web_applications.roadmap: Integrating RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) for deep sentiment and data analysis.

web_applications.title: BizNest
web_applications.description: Built a responsive UI and a robust e-commerce backend with Stripe integration and RBAC.
key_achievements: Implemented a centralized authentication flow using Axios interceptors for automated token management and global error handling.
Architected a decoupled React frontend with a facade pattern and centralized hooks; applied an aggressive caching strategy to reduce redundant network requests.
web_applications.roadmap: Implementing AI-based dynamic recommendations and a purchase guide.

web_applications.title: Grocery Hub
web_applications.description: Architected a full-cycle ordering system using PHP and MySQL relational database design.
key_achievements: Implemented optimized SQL queries for inventory management and user authentication, ensuring data integrity
